---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a broken or incorrect behaviour in the extension
title: '[Bug] '
labels: ['bug']
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages from:
- `chrome://extensions` → Errors button on the extension card
- DevTools Console of the popup (right-click the popup → Inspect)

## Screenshots / Console Output

If applicable, paste any relevant logs or screenshots here.

## Environment

- **Chrome Version:** (e.g. 124.0.6367.82)
- **Extension Version:** (found in `package.json` or `chrome://extensions`)
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14)
- **AMD NPU Daemon enabled?** Yes / No
  - If yes, which runtime? (Lemonade / GAIA / LM Studio)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
